description: Create a content slide on smart robotics growth using a three-column layout with a vertical bar chart for robots in use worldwide, a horizontal bar chart of robot density by country, and a right sidebar with explanatory bullets.

header.headline: Smart robotics is a growth area expected to play a significant role across a variety of applications – Asian countries lead in terms of robots deployed

center.title: Number of industrial robots per 100' employees in manufacturing, 2019

right.title: Industrial robots, newly installed in 2020 ['000]
right.body:
China: 168
Japan: 38
US: 31
Korea: 31
Germany: 22
Other countries not specified.

> Smart robots are autonomous AI systems that are capable of learning from and interacting with their environment – this allows for collaboration with humans
> Pending further developments in AI as well as robotics, future smart robotics will see considerable growth in service robots for professional applications in medicine, logistics and field use; for example, smart robots could be deployed in the maintenance industry to repair or retrofit water pipes
> Based on the theory of swarm behavior, swarm robotics champions the idea to deploy a group of small/cheaper smart robots equipped with sensors to identify defects in buildings or infrastructure
